    <desc lang="en">In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's south is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the north: football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.</desc>
  </programme>
  <programme start="20190920153000 +0000" stop="20190920170000 +0000" channel="13711">
    <title lang="en">Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Two: 1933-1959</title>
    <desc lang="en">Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the 1950s. In 1958, LSU won with star running back Billy Cannon leading the way, and a year later Cannon had epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss.</desc>
  </programme>
  <programme start="20190920170000 +0000" stop="20190920183000 +0000" channel="13711">
    <title lang="en">Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Three: 1960-1970</title>
